mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_complex ( complex_name, apt_seq, sigungu_cd, legal_dong, umd_cd, road_address, jibun_address, build_year, household_count, dong_count, geo_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{complexName}, #{aptSeq}, #{sigunguCd}, #{legalDong}, #{umdCd}, #{roadAddress}, #{jibunAddress}, #{buildYear}, #{householdCount}, #{dongCount}, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apt_complex WHERE apt_seq = #{aptSeq}
SELECT * FROM apt_complex ORDER BY complex_id DESC
